title: Device Home Screen - Battery Charging Icon
scenario: Device Home Screen battery icon changes from percentage to bolt when charging and reverts to percentage when charger is disconnected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Observe the battery icon and percentage displayed for the connected device (headset/earbuds) when not connected to a charger.
4. Connect the headset/earbuds to a charger.
5. Observe the battery icon on the Home screen.
6. Disconnect the headset/earbuds from the charger.
7. Observe the battery icon on the Home screen.
expected: When the device is not charging, the Home screen shows a battery icon with a percentage value. When the device is connected to a charger, the battery icon changes to show a bolt icon instead of the percentage value. When the charger is disconnected, the bolt icon disappears and the percentage value returns.
